## 🎨 Content Submission Form

> *"The suggestion box is open. Unlike most suggestion boxes, this one is actually checked."*

### What are you submitting?
- [ ] Meme
- [ ] Written content (post, article, copy)
- [ ] Design asset
- [ ] Video or animation concept (describe the idea or share an external link — GitHub does not support video uploads)
- [ ] Community event idea
- [ ] Translation of existing document
- [ ] Other: ___

### Content title or description
Give it a name or a short description.

### The content itself
Paste text directly, attach files, or share a link below.

### Platform(s) this is intended for
- [ ] X / Twitter
- [ ] Discord
- [ ] Telegram
- [ ] Reddit
- [ ] Instagram
- [ ] GitHub
- [ ] All / Any

### Anything else we should know?
Context, inspiration, or notes for the moderation team.

---

> By submitting content, you confirm that:
> - It is your original work or you have the right to share it
> - It follows the [Code of Conduct](../../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
> - You grant CubertCoin permission to use it across official channels
> - It aligns with the brand voice defined in the [Brand Book](../../brand-book/)
